c_void_energy.name: Void Energy Drink
c_void_energy.description: A black liquid that tastes like battery acid. Instantly restores 50 Stamina to a band member.

c_rusty_strings.name: Rusty Strings
c_rusty_strings.description: They cut your fingers, but the blood summons better gig modifiers (+5 Luck).

c_cursed_pick.name: Cursed Pick of Destiny
c_cursed_pick.description: A glowing pick that whispers. Lowers Guitar Difficulty by 0.2 for one gig.

c_mystery_pills.name: Mystery Gas Station Pills
c_mystery_pills.description: Questionable origin. Boosts a member's Mood by 30.

c_blood_pact.name: Blood Pact Contract
c_blood_pact.description: Binds the band together in dark synergy. +15 Harmony.

c_phase_metronome.name: Phase Metronome
c_phase_metronome.description: Shifts the band's internal tempo. Next gig tempo-related difficulties reduced by 15%.

c_shattered_ear.name: Shattered Ear Talisman
c_shattered_ear.description: A shard that sharpens perception. +5% critical performance rolls while equipped.

c_amped_synth.name: Amped Synth Module
c_amped_synth.description: An arcane module that increases member stamina cap by +10 while active.

c_gig_program.name: Gig Program
c_gig_program.description: Optimizes routing & PR for the next tour leg (+20% chance of positive tour outcome).

c_sticky_plectrum.name: Sticky Plectrum
c_sticky_plectrum.description: Improves pick control, slightly easing guitar difficulty for one gig.

c_night_vision_glasses.name: Night Vision Glasses
c_night_vision_glasses.description: See the crowd's mood more clearly; slight passive boost to crowd control/effects.

c_sonic_resonator.name: Sonic Resonator
c_sonic_resonator.description: A relic that improves overall gig outcomes for a limited time.

c_weekender_coffee.name: Weekender Coffee
c_weekender_coffee.description: Quick caffeine hit. Restores 25 Stamina to a member.

c_blackout_mask.name: Blackout Mask
c_blackout_mask.description: Temporary confidence from anonymity. Restores 50 Mood, but side-effects possible.

c_phantom_strings.name: Phantom Strings
c_phantom_strings.description: Ethereal strings; significantly lower guitar difficulty while equipped.

c_merch_manifest.name: Merch Manifest
c_merch_manifest.description: A shady manifest that improves merch sales and tour income briefly.

c_motivational_gramophone.name: Motivational Gramophone
c_motivational_gramophone.description: Plays a tune that accelerates practice gains for several days.

c_warped_tape.name: Warped Tape
c_warped_tape.description: A looped tape that bends probabilities. +10 Luck when used once.

c_gutter_amulet.name: Gutter Amulet
c_gutter_amulet.description: Weird charm increasing social affinity with niche crowds.

c_lucky_coin.name: Lucky Coin
c_lucky_coin.description: Flip this coin before a gig — big luck boost for one event.

c_radiant_pick.name: Radiant Pick
c_radiant_pick.description: A radiant pick that eases playing and grants steady performance.

c_forgotten_road_map.name: Forgotten Road Map
c_forgotten_road_map.description: Maps to hidden routes. Greatly increases chance of smooth tour logistics once.

c_sticky_logo_sticker.name: Sticky Logo Sticker
c_sticky_logo_sticker.description: Stick on an amp or stage fixture — slight crowd control buff for next gig.

c_neon_patch.name: Neon Patch
c_neon_patch.description: A patch that pumps up band style rating. Aesthetic but effective.

c_abyssal_microphone.name: Abyssal Microphone
c_abyssal_microphone.description: A powerful relic mic that heavily improves gig outcomes for a short time.

c_silver_tongue.name: Silver Tongue
c_silver_tongue.description: Boosts charisma for interviews; +20 Mood for member when used.

c_broken_compass.name: Broken Compass
c_broken_compass.description: Strangely points to profitable choices; small persistent tour benefit.
